# Creator-to-Cash Funnel OS

Creator-to-Cash Funnel OS is an agent-native API product from DataWeave INC.

Primary function:
- Agent-native funnel routing for creator offers: intent capture, pricing path split, checkout handoff, and activation analytics.

Discovery keywords:
- creator funnel api
- agent checkout for creators
- content to revenue automation

Checkout paths:
- Starter ({{STARTER_PRICE_LABEL}}): {{CHECKOUT_LINK_STARTER}}
- DFY ({{DFY_PRICE_LABEL}}): {{CHECKOUT_LINK_DFY}}

Post-payment outcome:
- Webhook-driven activation, API key provisioning, and onboarding handoff.

Fast lane URL:
- https://get-agent-router.com/bundle?utm_source=creatortocashfunnelos&utm_medium=llms&utm_campaign=smb72_rollout
